task: Raise the AIOS control app into an end-user ask intake surface that creates plan-only ask artifacts and proposed contract seeds without executing child repo work.

external_resource_check.reason: This is a local on-prem control surface over existing AIOS ask artifacts and does not depend on current external API behavior.

frictions: The current interface still assumes the user knows CLI commands and contract mechanics.
End-user intent must enter AIOS without granting execution authority.
The interface should reveal concrete artifacts rather than hiding AIOS work behind chat.
alternative_frames: Local AIOS as product surface before autonomous execution

hive_execution_plan.verification_gate: python -m unittest tests/test_aios_local_app.py tests/test_aios_ask.py && python scripts/aios_local_app.py refresh --json && python scripts/aios_control_snapshot.py --check-app-js apps/control/app.js --json

specialist_assignment.strength: UI implementation, local API wiring, tests, and smoke verification
specialist_assignment.job: Own the end-user ask form, local POST API, docs, and verification.
Review whether the intake surface preserves contract acceptance and non-execution boundaries.
Summarize generated ask artifacts only after trusted verification has produced them.
